records.m_Talk_ENG: Wyler's been put back into jail, just like you wanted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wyler's been put back into jail, just like you wanted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wyler's been put back into jail, just like you wanted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even Jonie & Melonie will have a hard time getting him out now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even Jonie & Melonie will have a hard time getting him out now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even Jonie & Melonie will have a hard time getting him out now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, better yet, there won't be a reason for sponsors to hire him anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, better yet, there won't be a reason for sponsors to hire him anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, better yet, there won't be a reason for sponsors to hire him anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll let you have a minute.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll let you have a minute.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll let you have a minute.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Boss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Boss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Boss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniffle...* Hnnggh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniffle...* Hnnggh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniffle...* Hnnggh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never thought I'd encounter a famous actress here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never thought I'd encounter a famous actress here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never thought I'd encounter a famous actress here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I remember you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I remember you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I remember you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first time we met, it was so loud with all those reporters. But now, it is silent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first time we met, it was so loud with all those reporters. But now, it is silent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first time we met, it was so loud with all those reporters. But now, it is silent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For some reason, I also believe we have met before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For some reason, I also believe we have met before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For some reason, I also believe we have met before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place originally used to be a graveyard for those who died in the Grand Purification War.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place originally used to be a graveyard for those who died in the Grand Purification War.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place originally used to be a graveyard for those who died in the Grand Purification War.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, because some people preferred to be buried near their families, a second general-use graveyard was built nearby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, because some people preferred to be buried near their families, a second general-use graveyard was built nearby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, because some people preferred to be buried near their families, a second general-use graveyard was built nearby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you happen to have a family member who died in the war by chance?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you happen to have a family member who died in the war by chance?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you happen to have a family member who died in the war by chance?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I am here to express my condolences to those who sacrificed their lives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I am here to express my condolences to those who sacrificed their lives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I am here to express my condolences to those who sacrificed their lives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I enjoyed watching the semifinal match. You commanded those inept soldiers quite well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I enjoyed watching the semifinal match. You commanded those inept soldiers quite well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I enjoyed watching the semifinal match. You commanded those inept soldiers quite well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. But if you could see that they were inept, then it's my fault that I couldn't do better.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. But if you could see that they were inept, then it's my fault that I couldn't do better.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. But if you could see that they were inept, then it's my fault that I couldn't do better.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After solving countless cases, there is one thing that I came to realize.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After solving countless cases, there is one thing that I came to realize.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After solving countless cases, there is one thing that I came to realize.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's that within the invisible threads of destiny, our fates are actually intertwined by a bright red thread.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's that within the invisible threads of destiny, our fates are actually intertwined by a bright red thread.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's that within the invisible threads of destiny, our fates are actually intertwined by a bright red thread.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The things that seem unrelated at first glance... get tangled together to create an event.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The things that seem unrelated at first glance... get tangled together to create an event.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The things that seem unrelated at first glance... get tangled together to create an event.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My job is to thoroughly investigate and identify them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My job is to thoroughly investigate and identify them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My job is to thoroughly investigate and identify them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Too much responsibility can be poisonous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Too much responsibility can be poisonous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Too much responsibility can be poisonous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And your goals are clear, are they not?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And your goals are clear, are they not?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And your goals are clear, are they not?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe you are merely catching your breath for the time being. For you have a heavier burden to carry later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe you are merely catching your breath for the time being. For you have a heavier burden to carry later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe you are merely catching your breath for the time being. For you have a heavier burden to carry later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Forgive me for prying. Then, I shall look forward to the finals.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Forgive me for prying. Then, I shall look forward to the finals.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forgive me for prying. Then, I shall look forward to the finals.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, if you will excuse me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, if you will excuse me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, if you will excuse me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that you mention it, I have been thinking that someone has been secretly helping me recently.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that you mention it, I have been thinking that someone has been secretly helping me recently.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that you mention it, I have been thinking that someone has been secretly helping me recently.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For instance, an issue that occurred during the qualifiers was resolved one step ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For instance, an issue that occurred during the qualifiers was resolved one step ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For instance, an issue that occurred during the qualifiers was resolved one step ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And another time, the C.O.s that were attacking us suddenly disappeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And another time, the C.O.s that were attacking us suddenly disappeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And another time, the C.O.s that were attacking us suddenly disappeared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the Category 3 C.O. that I was expecting to appear did not show up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the Category 3 C.O. that I was expecting to appear did not show up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the Category 3 C.O. that I was expecting to appear did not show up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think that you are the one who has been secretly assisting us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think that you are the one who has been secretly assisting us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think that you are the one who has been secretly assisting us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: May I ask why?
records.m_Talk_DEU: May I ask why?
records.m_Talk_FRA: May I ask why?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although I saw from afar, I'll always be cheering for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although I saw from afar, I'll always be cheering for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although I saw from afar, I'll always be cheering for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm actually a fan of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm actually a fan of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm actually a fan of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Well. I was merely rooting for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Well. I was merely rooting for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Well. I was merely rooting for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I am a fan. Of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I am a fan. Of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I am a fan. Of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does that answer your question?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does that answer your question?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does that answer your question?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... I appreciate your support. But I won't be able to give you an autograph.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... I appreciate your support. But I won't be able to give you an autograph.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... I appreciate your support. But I won't be able to give you an autograph.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. How unfortunate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu. How unfortunate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu. How unfortunate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps I can change your mind with a bit of advice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps I can change your mind with a bit of advice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps I can change your mind with a bit of advice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle Wright. Do not trust her so much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle Wright. Do not trust her so much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle Wright. Do not trust her so much.
